task_steps:
1. Configure Family Tree (Branch)
  2. Configure Family Tree (Branch) Photo
  3. Configure Family Tree (Branch) Descendants
  4. Display Family Tree (Branch) Descendant Names
  5. Data Entry: (Family Tree (Branch) Narrative
  6. Configure MyStory Link to Display: (Branch) Narrative
  7. Display Family Tree (Branch) Profile
task_price_frequency:
• Per (Root) Branch
  • One time Family Tree Branch Start/Up Charge.
  • Data Entry: (Family Tree (Branch) Narrative.

    [Limit 200 Words] - Up to 3 revisions allowed before additional charge due].

task_steps:
Choose, if descendants have no children



  1. Enable Descendant (Pay Per Click)
  2. Display Descendant Profile on Click
task_price_frequency:
• Per (Descendant) Click.
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Descendant Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If Deceased?

    An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased, Year Died, and Age at Death are also displayed

task_steps:
Choose, if descendants do have children



  1. Same Package Features as: 0010 Build (Root) Branch
  2. Except, a Descendant (Branch) is built instead.
task_price_frequency:
• Per Descendant (Branch)
  • One time Descendant Branch Start/Up Charge.
  • Data Entry: (Descendant) Branch Narrative.

    [Limit 200 Words] - Up to 3 revisions allowed before additional charge due].

task_steps:
Choose, if you want to write a descendant narrative (tribute, memorial, or give praise).  This could be paired with Option 1 or Option 2



  1. Data Entry: (Descendant Narrative)
  2. Display Descendant's Narrative when MyStory Link is Clicked
task_price_frequency:
• Per (Descendant) Narrative
  • Data Entry: (Descendant (Narrative).

    [Limit 200 Words] - Up to 3 revisions allowed before additional charge due].

task_steps:
Collaborate with Family Tree Creations to Design and Create:


  1. Fantasy Photos
  2. Posters
  3. Photo Collages
  4. Remove Distracting Photo Backgrounds
task_price_frequency:
• Per Hour.
  • (Up to 3 revisions allowed before additional charge due).
  • We design your digital Image or poster and provide a JPEG file which you print yourself.
